general.description: Generic helper available only as a subagent; primary harness work should consult graphify-searcher and required reviewers.

explore.description: Repository exploration helper available only as a subagent; primary harness work should consult graphify-searcher first.

error-memory.description: Persistent error and decision memory for Gestor-de-proyectos-Ti. Reads/writes errors_memory.json. Use to lookup known errors, record new ones, mark as resolved, or log architectural decisions.
